## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 💻 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 🚨 Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📋 Environment Details

### Ollama Model Used
- Model: [e.g., qwen2.5-coder:latest, codellama:13b, etc.]
- Model Size: [e.g., 7B, 13B, etc.]

### System Information
- Operating System: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python Version: [e.g., Python 3.10.0, Python 3.11.0]
- Ollama Version: [e.g., 0.1.20, 0.2.0]

### Project Configuration
- Any modifications to `config.yaml`? [Yes/No]
- If yes, please describe changes:

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🖼️ Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 📊 Error Logs
Please copy and paste any relevant error messages or logs:

```
Paste error logs here
```

## ✅ Verification
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar problems
- [ ] I have provided all requested information
- [ ] I can reproduce this issue consistently
